mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT P.PRODUCT_ID AS productId, P.PRODUCT_NAME AS productName, P.PRODUCT_PRICE AS productPrice, P.PRODUCT_PHOTO1 AS productPhoto1, P.PET_TYPE AS petType, P.AGE_GROUP AS ageGroup, NVL(SUM(OD.DETAIL_QTY), 0) AS totalQty FROM PRODUCT P LEFT JOIN ORDER_DETAIL OD ON P.PRODUCT_ID = OD.PRODUCT_ID WHERE P.PET_TYPE = '강아지' AND P.PRODUCT_ACTIVE_YN = 'Y' GROUP BY P.PRODUCT_ID, P.PRODUCT_NAME, P.PRODUCT_PRICE, P.PRODUCT_PHOTO1, P.PET_TYPE, P.AGE_GROUP ORDER BY totalQty DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 4

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT P.PRODUCT_ID AS productId, P.PRODUCT_NAME AS productName, P.PRODUCT_PRICE AS productPrice, P.PRODUCT_PHOTO1 AS productPhoto1, P.PET_TYPE AS petType, P.AGE_GROUP AS ageGroup, NVL(SUM(OD.DETAIL_QTY), 0) AS totalQty FROM PRODUCT P LEFT JOIN ORDER_DETAIL OD ON P.PRODUCT_ID = OD.PRODUCT_ID WHERE P.PET_TYPE = '고양이' AND P.PRODUCT_ACTIVE_YN = 'Y' GROUP BY P.PRODUCT_ID, P.PRODUCT_NAME, P.PRODUCT_PRICE, P.PRODUCT_PHOTO1, P.PET_TYPE, P.AGE_GROUP ORDER BY totalQty DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 4

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT P.PRODUCT_ID AS productId, P.PRODUCT_NAME AS productName, P.PRODUCT_PRICE AS productPrice, P.PRODUCT_PHOTO1 AS productPhoto1, P.PET_TYPE AS petType, P.AGE_GROUP AS ageGroup, NVL(SUM(OD.DETAIL_QTY), 0) AS totalQty FROM PRODUCT P LEFT JOIN ORDER_DETAIL OD ON P.PRODUCT_ID = OD.PRODUCT_ID WHERE P.PRODUCT_ACTIVE_YN = 'Y' GROUP BY P.PRODUCT_ID, P.PRODUCT_NAME, P.PRODUCT_PRICE, P.PRODUCT_PHOTO1, P.PET_TYPE, P.AGE_GROUP ORDER BY totalQty DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 4

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT P.PRODUCT_ID AS productId, P.PRODUCT_NAME AS productName, P.PRODUCT_PRICE AS productPrice, P.PRODUCT_PHOTO1 AS productPhoto1, P.PET_TYPE AS petType, P.AGE_GROUP AS ageGroup, NVL(SUM(OD.DETAIL_QTY), 0) AS totalQty FROM PRODUCT P LEFT JOIN ORDER_DETAIL OD ON P.PRODUCT_ID = OD.PRODUCT_ID WHERE P.PRODUCT_ACTIVE_YN = 'Y' AND P.PET_TYPE = #{petType} AND (P.AGE_GROUP = #{ageGroup} OR P.AGE_GROUP = '전연령') GROUP BY P.PRODUCT_ID, P.PRODUCT_NAME, P.PRODUCT_PRICE, P.PRODUCT_PHOTO1, P.PET_TYPE, P.AGE_GROUP ORDER BY totalQty DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 4

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT P.PRODUCT_ID AS productId, P.PRODUCT_NAME AS productName, P.PRODUCT_PRICE AS productPrice, P.PRODUCT_PHOTO1 AS productPhoto1, P.PET_TYPE AS petType, P.AGE_GROUP AS ageGroup, P.PRODUCT_REG_DATE AS productRegDate FROM PRODUCT P WHERE P.PRODUCT_ACTIVE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY P.PRODUCT_REG_DATE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT P.PRODUCT_ID AS productId, P.PRODUCT_NAME AS productName, P.PRODUCT_PRICE AS productPrice, P.PRODUCT_PHOTO1 AS productPhoto1, P.PET_TYPE AS petType, P.AGE_GROUP AS ageGroup FROM PRODUCT P WHERE P.PRODUCT_ACTIVE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY P.PRODUCT_PRICE ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5
SELECT PET_NO AS petNo, MEMBER_NO AS memberNo, PET_TYPE AS petType, PET_NAME AS petName, PET_AGE AS petAge, PET_PHOTO AS petPhoto FROM PET WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND ROWNUM = 1
